title: EMFormer: Efficient Multi-Scale Transformer for Accumulative Context Weather Forecasting

key_components: Multi-convolution (multi-convs) layer optimized with custom CUDA kernels
technical_innovations: Hard-aware design for efficient multi-scale feature capture
Injection of historical Key-Value (KV) pairs in current generation steps
Memory-pruning mechanism to bound computational requirements

contributions: Efficient Multi-Scale Architecture via Hard-aware Design

performance.comparison: Consistently outperforms VA-MoE across pretraining and multi-step finetuning
performance.training_setup: Two models trained with A100 GPUs

evaluation.visualizations: Figure 1 shows training convergence and medium-term forecast performance

problem_addressed: Stepwise error accumulation during auto-regressive forecasting in data-driven weather prediction models
